creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191677
Patch upating x11/sterm to 0.8.1

A quick update to st has been published fixing a couple bugs, which were found after the recent 0.8 version release.

No changes in the Makefile apart from a DISTVERION bump.

QA:
 - portlint
 - poudriere: 11.1 (amd64, i386), 10.4 (amd64)
 - manual testing: 12-CURRENT (amd64)
